creator: divVerent@gmail.com
text:
Repro: add to a /etc/pam.d/login:

auth optional pam_exec.so expose_authtok -- /bin/sh -c 'cat > /dev/null'

Result: can no longer login; login will segfault in a strlen(...) + 1 call.

Debugging further yields that this happens in the _second_ call to pam_exec, namely, pam_sm_setcred. pam_exec there queries the auth token but seems to be getting NULL back.

Suggesting "somehow" handling the case of the pam_get_item(PAM_AUTHTOK) being NULL.
